top_signals.title: US Futures Rise on Deal to Reopen Strait of Hormuz; SpaceX Gains
top_signals.summary: US stock index futures climbed after Washington and Tehran reached an interim deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, sending oil prices lower and easing concern about inflation ahead of Kevin Warsh’s first meeting as chairman of the Federal Reserve later this week. SpaceX shares rose in premarket trading, helping boost risk-on sentiment.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S.-Iran deal explained: What we know — and what remains unresolved
top_signals.summary: Stocks rose after a preliminary U.S.-Iran agreement, but questions remain over Hormuz, Israel and what follows a potential signing in Geneva.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
